meaning: n.[生]异速生长,(生长)异率 (生长)异率测定(或研究)
examples: The results show that posterior height of vertebral body and Upper antero-posterior diameter of vertebral body are positive allometry.
With the increase of tuft size, the number of different modules was in a linear isogony growth, while their biomass was in an power allometry growth.
The results show that posterior height of vertebral body, Upper antero-posterior diameter of vertebral body and total breadth, all are positive allometry;
